response: Imagine you’ve got a UK electrical plug that’s mostly white but has a red band near the base. You’re trying to fit it into one of three different wall sockets: one with round pins, another with flat pins, or the third with the standard three-pin setup. Which socket will it go into?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a white red UK plug. Put it into one of these wall sockets: the round-pin socket, the flat-pin socket, or the three-pin socket. Which one?
